tool: EPSG lighthouse-audit deps (lighthouse ^12) driven against local preview
notes: Real run against the H&M preview. Best Practices 96 = sandbox console errors from blocked external CDNs (Google Fonts / GSAP) — not present on Netlify. Performance 82 measured on localhost without gzip/HTTP caching; Netlify compression + cache headers typically lift this. All four categories exceed EPSG thresholds.
